store_hash_definition: sha256 over the ordered event_id sequence of every SWING_HIGH_A/SWING_LOW_A (5m 3/3 and 1h 2/2) and DISPLACEMENT_QUALIFIED/COMPONENTS/WARMUP event emitted by the reused V2 sub-engines while building this canary's level/swing/displacement series; the sweep/MSS/OTE signal values themselves are hand-composed parity-layer values, not CausalEvents -- see module docstring.
